gainers.catalyst: Fiscal Q3 earnings beat + strong lighting/IoT demand guidance. Revenue surprise positive.
AI-driven IVY platform momentum + short squeeze. Pure speculative flow, no fundamental catalyst.
Fiscal Q4 2026 earnings optimism + biotech sector rotation. Protein sciences demand outlook.
Protein degradation platform data readout + M&A speculation. Biotech momentum continuation.
AI smartphone chip demand + royalty collection uplift. Broad tech momentum tailwind.

losers.catalyst: Memory crunch deepening — MacBook/iPad price hike announced. Supply chain margin pressure fears.
China travel demand slowdown fears + macro headwinds. Geopolitical risk premium widening.
AI data annotation revenue miss fears. High valuation compression after prior run-up.
EV sector demand slowdown, delivery miss fears, cash burn concerns. Low volume = thin tape.
Clean energy tax credit uncertainty + hydrogen funding delay. Sector rotation out of speculative energy.

callSetups.rationale: QQQ VWAP (716.43) üstünde, ORB high 726.83 test ediliyor. Pullback 712'ye kadar beklenmeli. Risk-on eğilimi var. Volume confirmation.
VWAP (357.6) üstünde güçlü momentum. Earnings beat sonrası continuation. Entry VWAP testi. Fiyat 368.62, pullback 355 beklenmeli.
VWAP (70.41) üstünde, narrow range breakout. Biotech momentum. Volume confirmation. Entry 70.3 VWAP retest.
VWAP (10.25) üstünde, short squeeze + AI momentum. Entry VWAP retest 10.0. Yüksek volatilite, meme flow riski.
VWAP (117.27) yakınında, gün içi dip 104.335'ten bounce. Biotech momentum. Yüksek volatilite ama 2.5x R/R.

vwapNotes: SPY 733.54 VWAP 734.17 altında — hafif negatif. QQQ 717.16 VWAP 716.43 üstünde — tech güçlü. IWM 298.58 VWAP 298.99 altında — small cap zayıf. VIX 19.38 (+4.03%) yükselişte — risk-off. Genel tape: büyük-cap tech (QQQ) diğerlerinden ayrışıyor. Gap fill: SPY açılış 738.91'den gap aşağı oluşmuş, 729.6 low'a kadar kapanma eğilimi var.

riskAssessment.vixRegime: VIX 19.38 (+4.03%) — elevated/normal border. Fear ölçüsü artıyor, complacency yok.
riskAssessment.sectorRotation: Tech (QQQ) relative strength, small-cap (IWM) lagging. Energy/Consumer zayıf. Biotech momentum.
riskAssessment.earningsRisk: SNX, WGO, CMC, LNN, DRI, MKC earnings today. IV crush risk active. 0DTE YASAK on all earnings names.
riskAssessment.macroRisk: Geopolitical tensions easing (Middle East) but VIX elevated. FOMC outlook uncertain, 10-year yield 4.39%. AI capex feeding into tech earnings.
